name: Angelstruck
short_description: Angelstruck is a 2D roguelite shooter where you demolish the forces of Heaven as you attempt to reach the pearly gates. Overcharge your holy rifle, and min-max your way into insane game-breaking builds. Unlock permanent capabilities and powerful screen-destroying weapons that feed on kills.
detailed_description:
UNLEASH HEAVENLY HAVOC

Experience the adrenaline rush of Angelstruck, a dynamic 2D shooter action roguelite. Assume the mantle of an Underworld angel and engage in a fierce battle against waves of celestial enemies descending from above.


FACE FORMIDABLE BOSSES

As you embark on your journey, fortify your abilities to overcome the relentless challenges presented by swarms of adversaries and imposing bosses. Your mission as an angel of the Underworld demands continuous growth to emerge victorious.

CHOOSE WISELY AND ELEVATE YOUR ABILITIES

In each run, strategic choices await as you accumulate experience and select perks to enhance your prowess. Elevate these perks to unlock augmented versions, granting you additional abilities that turn the tide of battle in your favor.

UNEARTH DEVASTATING ABILITIES THROUGH SYNERGY

Delve into the art of synergy by combining two compatible, max-powered perks. Witness the birth of awe-inspiring new abilities that wreak havoc on your opponents, showcasing your mastery of the celestial battlefield.


REAP REWARDS, FORGE DESTINY

With each run, your performance reaps its rewards in the form of credits. These valuable credits can be strategically employed to unlock permanent abilities and procure new weapons, arming you for future encounters.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish, Spanish - Spain
